project: APEX Competitive Intelligence Agent (Agent 25) — Production Rewrite

step_1.name: Content Cleaning Function
step_1.description: Added clean_scraped_content() to strip boilerplate, navigation, URLs, HTML tags, and weak content from Firecrawl output
step_1.impact: Production-quality markdown cleaned to ~6000 chars before Claude analysis

step_2.name: Multi-Source Intelligence Gathering
step_2.description: Added search_competitor_intelligence() function that crawls website + 7 targeted searches per competitor
step_2.impact: Each competitor now researched from 8 sources instead of 1 URL crawl

step_3.name: KPI Extraction Rewrite
step_3.description: Completely rewrote extract_competitor_kpis() with production-quality prompts
improvements: Uses multi-source research block (all 8 sources combined per competitor)
System prompt emphasizes C-suite language and fact-verification
User prompt uses exact fallback text for missing data
No longer passes only 4000 chars — passes full combined research
Improved JSON schema with better fallback values
Structured rubric for 11 KPIs instead of vague estimates

step_4.name: Renderer Input Builder Fix
step_4.description: Fixed hardcoded client values in renderer JSON
fixes: recommendations.defend built from competitor threat_level analysis
recommendations.position built from axis labels and perception gaps
step_4.impact: No more hardcoded Mesh Bioplastics values in output

rewritten_functions: extract_competitor_kpis(scoring_data, client_slug) — complete rewrite for multi-source research
modified_sections: Renderer input builder — recommendations now dynamically generated from scoring_data
Queue handling — type checks added for robustness

production_impact.cli: No CLI changes — run 'watch' as before
production_impact.cost: Same: 2 Claude calls per job (axis/scoring + KPI extraction)
production_impact.runtime: +5-10 minutes per job (7 additional searches × 2 sec rate limit per competitor)
production_impact.error_handling: Improved: JSON parse errors now return empty list instead of crashing

acceptance_criteria: ✅ Step 1 findings reported — firecrawl_agent.py uses crawl/scrape/extract modes only
✅ Renderer input builder fixed — no hardcoded client values
✅ Recommendations built from scoring_data not hardcoded
next_steps: Run end-to-end test with Mesh Bioplastics (3 named competitors) to verify multi-source intelligence gathering quality and KPI extraction
